---
title: "Publications"
pagetitle: "Publications | Indra P. Acharja"
---

```{=html}
<div class="section-header">
  <h1>Publications</h1>
  <p>Also available on <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=81ZJUakAAAAJ" target="_blank">Google Scholar</a> and <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Indra-Acharja" target="_blank">ResearchGate</a>.</p>
</div>

<nav class="pub-toc" aria-label="Jump to section">
  <a href="#under-review">Under Review</a> ·
  <a href="#peer-reviewed">Peer-Reviewed Articles</a> ·
  <a href="#book-chapters">Book Chapters</a> ·
  <a href="#reports">Reports &amp; Strategies</a> ·
  <a href="#popular">Popular Science</a>
</nav>

<!-- ─── UNDER REVIEW ─── -->
<div class="pub-section" id="under-review">
  <div class="pub-section-title">Under Review</div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors">
      <strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong>, Green, M. C., Khandu, P., Tshering, J., Shimano, S., Nima, P., &amp; Tobgay, T.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-title">
      Mapping distribution and intensity of direct threats along White-bellied Heron habitats in Bhutan using multi-year field observations.
      <span class="pub-badge badge-review">Under review — Oryx</span>
    </span>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors">
      <strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong>, Green, M. C., Tshering, S., Shimano, S., Tobgay, T., &amp; Dorji, T.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-title">
      Declining breeding performance in the critically endangered White-bellied Heron (<em>Ardea insignis</em>) coincides with anthropogenically driven habitat contraction in Bhutan.
      <span class="pub-badge badge-review">Under review — Bird Conservation International</span>
    </span>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors">
      <strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong>, Green, M. C., Tshering, S., Tobgay, T., Tshering, J., &amp; Shimano, S.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-title">
      Quantifying cumulative impact of anthropogenic pressures and habitat contraction of the White-bellied Heron (<em>Ardea insignis</em>) in Bhutan's riverine ecosystems.
      <span class="pub-badge badge-review">Under review — Conservation Science and Practice</span>
    </span>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- ─── PEER-REVIEWED ─── -->
<div class="pub-section" id="peer-reviewed">
  <div class="pub-section-title">Peer-Reviewed Articles</div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors">
      <strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong>, Green, M. C., Okahisa, Y., Phuntsho, T., Tobgay, T., Khandu, P., &amp; Shimano, S.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-title">
      Increasing variability and declining breeding success: A major challenge in the conservation of the critically endangered <em>Ardea insignis</em> (White-bellied Heron).
    </span>
    <span class="pub-journal"><em>Ornithology</em>, ukag017. 2026.</span>
    <div class="pub-links">
      <a class="pub-link" href="https://doi.org/10.1093/ornithology/ukag017" target="_blank">DOI</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors">
      <strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong>, Okahisa, Y., Green, M. C., Lhendup, T., Tshering, S.,
      Phuntsho, T., Tobgay, T., Lungten, L., Tshering, J., &amp; Leki, S.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-title">
      Investigation of effective conservation measures for the critically endangered 
      White-bellied Heron <em>Ardea insignis</em> using an integrated population model 
      and Bayesian population viability analysis.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-journal">Avian Conservation and Ecology, 20(1):19. 2025.</span>
    <div class="pub-links">
      <a class="pub-link" href="https://doi.org/10.5751/ACE-02833-200119" target="_blank">DOI</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors">
      Wanner, M., Siemensma, F., <strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong>, Tshering, J., Khandu, P., 
      Lal Gajmer, S., Gyeltshen, C., Dorji, T., Tenzin, K., &amp; Shimano, S.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-title">
      Testate amoebae from the wetlands of the Phobjikha Valley of Bhutan, the Eastern Himalaya.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-journal">European Journal of Protistology, 126125. 2024.</span>
    <div class="pub-links">
      <a class="pub-link" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ejop.2024.126125" target="_blank">DOI</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors">
      Lungten, L., <strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong>, Tobgay, T., Phuntsho, T., &amp; Lhendup, T.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-title">
      Diversity of benthic macroinvertebrates in White-bellied Heron landscape Punatsangchhu 
      and Mangdechhu River, Bhutan.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-journal">International Journal of Fauna and Biological Studies, 10(4):09–17. 2023.</span>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors">
      Maheswaran, G., <strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong>, Sharma, L. K., Mondal, H. S., 
      Mukherjee, T., Alam, I., &amp; Majumder, A.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-title">
      Save the white-bellied heron from extinction.
      <span class="pub-badge badge-journal">Science</span>
    </span>
    <span class="pub-journal">Science, 373(6561):1317. 2021.</span>
    <div class="pub-links">
      <a class="pub-link" href="https://doi.org/10.1126/science.abl9682" target="_blank">DOI</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors">
      Nishiumi, I., <strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong>, Tshering, J., Yoshikawa, M., Khandu, P., 
      Gajmer, S. L., Tsukasa, W., Tenzin, K., &amp; Shimano, S.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-title">
      Applying molecular sex identification methods to "Karma", the injured Black-necked Crane 
      (<em>Grus nigricollis</em>) of Phobjikha.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-journal">Journal of the Bhutan Ecological Society, 4. 2021.</span>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors">Dorji, T., Tshering, S., Wangchuk, N., &amp; <strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong></span>
    <span class="pub-title">
      Biomonitoring of health of Chubachu stream using macroinvertebrate diversity.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-journal">Bhutan Journal of Research and Development, 10(2). 2021.</span>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors">
      <strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong>, Tshering, S., Lhendup, T., &amp; Phuntsho, T.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-title">
      First observation of sexual conflict and parental infanticide in the Critically Endangered 
      White-bellied Heron <em>Ardea insignis</em>.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-journal">BirdingASIA, 35:38–42. 2021.</span>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors">
      Khandu, P., Gale, G. A., Pradhan, R., <strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong>, &amp; Bumrungsri, S.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-title">
      First record of successful breeding of the critically endangered White-bellied Heron 
      (<em>Ardea insignis</em>) in broadleaved trees.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-journal">The Journal of Animal and Plant Science, 30(2). 2020.</span>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors"><strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong></span>
    <span class="pub-title">
      Evaluation of nest habitat, site preferences, and architecture of the critically endangered 
      White-bellied Heron <em>Ardea insignis</em> in Bhutan.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-journal">Bird Conservation International, 30(4):599–617. 2019.</span>
    <div class="pub-links">
      <a class="pub-link" href="https://doi.org/10.1017/S095927091900042X" target="_blank">DOI</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors"><strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong></span>
    <span class="pub-title">
      The current population, distribution, and conservation status of the critically endangered 
      White-bellied Heron (<em>Ardea insignis</em>) in Bhutan.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-journal">Tropical Resources — Bulletin of the Yale Tropical Resources Institute, 38:1–10. 2019.</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ─── BOOK CHAPTERS ─── -->
<div class="pub-section" id="book-chapters">
  <div class="pub-section-title">Book Chapters &amp; Theses</div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors"><strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong></span>
    <span class="pub-title">White-bellied Heron.</span>
    <span class="pub-journal">
      In: <em>The Restless Rivers: Yarlung Tsangpo-Siang-Brahmaputra-Jamuna</em> 
      (G. Pangare, B. Nishat, X. Liao, &amp; H. M. Qaddumi, eds.). 
      International Bank for Reconstruction and Development / The World Bank, 
      Washington. pp. 145–146. 2021.
    </span>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors"><strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong></span>
    <span class="pub-title">
      Ungulate distribution, abundance, and habitat use in Phibsoo Wildlife Sanctuary. 
      (Unpublished master's thesis).
    </span>
    <span class="pub-journal">Forest Research Institute (Deemed) University, Dehradun, India. 2014.</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ─── REPORTS ─── -->
<div class="pub-section" id="reports">
  <div class="pub-section-title">Technical Reports &amp; Conservation Strategies</div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors">Tobgay, T., <strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong>, Tshering, J., &amp; Wangdi, N.</span>
    <span class="pub-title">White-bellied Heron Conservation Action Plan 2022–2031.</span>
    <span class="pub-journal">
      Royal Society for Protection of Nature (RSPN) &amp; Department of Forests and Park Services, Bhutan. 2022.
    </span>
    <div class="pub-links">
      <a class="pub-link" href="http://rspn.abitwebsites.com/downloads/2559/" target="_blank">Download</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors">
      <strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong>, Tshering, J., Phuntsho, T., Tshering, S., Lhendup, T., &amp; Hetch, D.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-title">White-bellied Heron Conservation Center Establishment and Management Plan, 2021.</span>
    <span class="pub-journal">Royal Society for Protection of Nature. 2021.</span>
    <div class="pub-links">
      <a class="pub-link" href="http://rspn.abitwebsites.com/downloads/2578/" target="_blank">Download</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors"><strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong></span>
    <span class="pub-title">The White-bellied Heron Annual Population Survey 2021.</span>
    <span class="pub-journal">Royal Society for Protection of Nature. 2021.</span>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors"><strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong></span>
    <span class="pub-title">The White-bellied Heron Annual Population Survey 2020.</span>
    <span class="pub-journal">Royal Society for Protection of Nature. 2020.</span>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors">RSPN</span>
    <span class="pub-title">
      Developing Ecosystem-based Solutions for Managing Biodiversity Landscapes in Bhutan: 
      A rapid biodiversity assessment in White-bellied Heron habitats along Punatsangchhu 
      and Mangdechhu basins, Bhutan.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-journal">Royal Society for Protection of Nature. 2022.</span>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors">RSPN</span>
    <span class="pub-title">
      Ecosystem and Socio-economic Resilience Analysis and Mapping: A pilot assessment in 
      White-bellied Heron habitats along Punatsangchhu and Mangdechhu basins.
    </span>
    <span class="pub-journal">Royal Society for Protection of Nature. 2022.</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ─── POPULAR ─── -->
<div class="pub-section" id="popular">
  <div class="pub-section-title">Popular Science &amp; Media Articles</div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors"><strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong></span>
    <span class="pub-title">Conservation of White-bellied Herons [South Asia].</span>
    <span class="pub-journal">Rewilding Success — Ecological Citizen. 2023.</span>
    <div class="pub-links">
      <a class="pub-link" href="https://rewilding.ecologicalcitizen.net/2023/01/11/white-bellied-heron-conservation-with-captive-breeding-south-asia/" target="_blank">Read</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-item">
    <span class="pub-authors"><strong>Acharja, I. P.</strong></span>
    <span class="pub-title">Punatsangchhu, the wintering paradise of migratory birds and birders.</span>
    <span class="pub-journal">Kuensel. March 2019.</span>
    <div class="pub-links">
      <a class="pub-link" href="https://kuenselonline.com/news/punatsangchhu-the-wintering-paradise-of-migratory-birds-and-birders" target="_blank">Read</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
